title: Flavor
description: An independent reimplementation (a "flavor") of the WhatsApp call protocol: a library or port that realizes the spec in real code. Distinct from a tool: a tool gathers evidence (warden, frida); a flavor corroborates the spec by independently implementing it. provenance.flavors entries reference these ids to record WHICH reimplementations agree on a fact. A flavor is a corroborating source, never a technique.

id.description: Stable flavor id; matches the file name.

url.description: Repository or homepage of the implementation.

maturity.description: How complete and usable the implementation is.

maintainer.description: Contributor id of the maintainer, if any (must match spec/contributors/).

covers.description: Protocol planes this flavor implements (coarse; the <id>.map.yaml gives the per-bit detail).

basis.description: Technique ids this flavor was reconstructed from (must be in the fixed technique set). Used to judge corroboration independence.

derives_from.description: Flavor ids this one was ported or derived from. A flavor is NOT independent corroboration of any flavor it derives from; the corroboration rule uses this to avoid double-counting a port and its upstream.
